items.title: Tapo Project
items.description: Tapo is a full-stack B2C e-commerce platform for laptop retail, with JWT auth, real-time chat, payment integration, and Dockerized deployment.
items.overview: Tapo is a single-store B2C e-commerce platform specialising in laptops, built as a full-stack learning project to apply production-ready Java + React patterns end to end. The backend is a Spring Boot API (Docker + Nginx) backed by Supabase PostgreSQL and Upstash Redis, while the React SPA ships real-time chat, payments, and a full admin dashboard. It covers the complete retail flow — catalog, cart, orders, reviews, returns, vouchers, flash sales, and inventory — across four RBAC roles.
highlights: JWT + Google OAuth2 auth with RBAC across 4 roles
PayOS payments, vouchers, and stock-limited flash sales
Spring Boot + React, Dockerized with 200+ backend tests
features: 🔐 Authentication: JWT + Refresh Token (Redis), Google OAuth2, email verification, and RBAC across Admin / Sales / Warehouse / Customer roles.
🛍️ Shopping & Orders: Product catalog with search & filter, cart, and full order lifecycle (PENDING → DELIVERED) with PayOS payment.
💬 Real-time Chat: WebSocket (STOMP) live chat between customers and support staff.
⭐ Reviews & Returns: 1–5 star reviews with admin approve/reject, plus a customer return-request workflow.
🏷️ Vouchers & Flash Sale: Fixed / percentage discounts with usage limits, and stock-limited flash-sale campaigns with countdown timers.
📦 Inventory: Stock import/export, auto-deduction on delivery, and low-stock alerts for warehouse staff.
📊 Admin Dashboard: Revenue charts, order statistics, blog & banner management, and user administration.
🌐 i18n & Instalments: Vietnamese / English UI (react-i18next) and a 6 / 12 / 18 / 24-month instalment calculator.

items.title: Trava Project
items.description: Trava is a comprehensive Task Management and Team Collaboration System designed to streamline project workflows.
items.overview: Trava is a multi-workspace task management system. I developed this project to explore Clean Architecture and modern web technologies, focusing on high scalability and a smooth user experience for team collaboration.
features: 🔐 Member Management: Secure registration, login, personal profile management, and security updates.
🏢 Workspace Management (Spaces): Supports Private and Team space models with clear role-based access control.
📩 Invitation System: Mechanism to send/receive Workspace invitations and manage invitation statuses in real-time.
✅ Task Management: Supports complex Task structures (Parent/Sub-tasks) with priority levels and workloads.
🔔 Notification System: Provides real-time updates on Space changes, Task assignments, and deadline reminders.

items.title: PhyGen Project
items.description: Phygen is an AI-Powered Physics Exam Generator System that helps teachers create exams automatically.
items.overview: Phygen leverages AI to automate the creation of physics exams for high school students. It supports custom difficulty levels and topic selection, generating high-quality questions and detailed explanations instantly.
features: 🏫 Curriculum Management: Flexible organization by Curriculum → Subject → Chapter → Topic → Section.
📝 Question Bank: Supports various question types, media attachments via Cloudinary, and categorization by difficulty.
⚙️ Automated Exam Generation: Builds detailed exam matrices and automatically synthesizes exams.
💳 Payment Integration: Supports secure transactions via the PayOS gateway.
🔐 Security & Authentication: Login/Registration with Email OTP, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).
📄 Document Publishing: Supports exporting exams and documents to Word/PDF formats.

items.title: TimeSwap Project
items.description: TimeSwap is a Time Exchange and Job Marketplace Platform connecting users for skill sharing and services.
items.overview: TimeSwap creates a marketplace where users can exchange services using a 'time' currency. It includes robust job listing, search, and application systems with an integrated E-Wallet for secure transactions.
features: 👤 User Authentication: Login / Register with email, Forgot Password, Secure Logout.
📋 Job Management: Listings, Search by name/fee/industry/location, Post Job, Apply for Jobs, Applicant List.
🤖 AI Chatbot Integration: Integrated ChatGPT API to assist users with job-related inquiries.
💳 Payment Management: E-Wallet Integration for seamless transactions with Transaction History.
📄 User Profile Management: View & Edit Profile, Account Information with subscription details.

items.title: Adobe Migration Project
items.description: A large-scale content migration project for an enterprise client using Adobe Experience Manager (AEM).
items.overview: This project involved migrating and validating thousands of landing pages from legacy CMS platforms to Adobe Experience Manager. I ensured structural integrity and content consistency across global enterprise environments.
features: 📄 Large-Scale Migration: Migrated and validated thousands of landing pages from legacy CMS platforms.
✅ Content Consistency: Ensured structural integrity and content consistency across global enterprise environments.
🔄 Agile Governance: Followed strictly governed Agile workflows for enterprise deployment and collaboration.
